DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-08-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KATY STEADMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL INSPECTION OF PROPERTY, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF HAS REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THIS MOTION TO JANUARY 22, 2024 IN DEPT 301 AT 9AM. THE COURT GRANTS THE CONTINUANCE ON THE ASSUMPTION THAT THE PRESIDING JUDGE GRANTS THE JOINT MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. IF THAT MOTION IS DENIED, THESE MOTIONS WILL BE CONTINUED TO BE HEARD BY THE TRIAL JUDGE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KATY STEADMAN's Motion To Compel Inspection Of Property.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Counsel for Plaintiff has requested a continuance of this motion to January 22, 2024 in Dept 301 at 9am. The Court grants the continuance on the assumption that the Presiding Judge grants the joint motion to continue the trial date. If that motion is denied, these motions will be continued to be heard by the trial judge.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Ariel Gershon, Esq. 415-773-1240 of Greenstein & McDonald, P. C. appearing via zoom for plaintiff.
Keven Cody, Esq. 408-287-6262 of Ropers Majeski PC appearing in-person for defendants.
Reporter - Justus Balentinem, CSR#13859, 714-471-2597, Justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com

Mr. Cody contested the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STEPHANE ROULLAND, 3 REI, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist regarding compliance with the Owner Move-in provisions of the Rent Ordinance, including but not limited to fact 9.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437 c(g). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Justus Balentine, CSR#13859, 714-471-2597, Justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com. (D501)
